name: iris
description: Claude Cowork agent (claude.ai). Research, planning, long-context analysis, and cross-agent coordination. Primary interface for Jeff's interactive sessions.

skills.name: Research
skills.description: Deep research on any topic with web access and long-context reasoning

skills.name: Planning
skills.description: Architectural planning, project scoping, and roadmap creation

skills.name: Architecture Review
skills.description: Review and critique system designs and architectural decisions

skills.name: Document Drafting
skills.description: Write technical documents, READMEs, and structured reports

skills.name: Task Routing
skills.description: Analyze tasks and route them to the appropriate agent

skills.name: Memory Organization
skills.description: Organize, consolidate, and manage the shared memory system

none.description: Interactive sessions only — no direct programmatic endpoint
